rect.style: transform-origin:left; animation: vo-eq3 2.2s ease-in-out infinite; transform-box:fill-box;
transform-origin:left; animation: vo-eq2 1.9s ease-in-out infinite; transform-box:fill-box;
transform-origin:left; animation: vo-eq1 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; transform-box:fill-box;

circle.style: transform-origin:center; animation: vo-spin 22s linear infinite reverse;
